promptTemplateCard.cards.description: Generate crisp, audience-centric copy for your website's card elements - title and body included.

promptTemplateCard.cartAbandonment.descr: With a mix of charm and strategy, this prompt delivers diligent web text to prompt customers on their pending orders.

promptTemplateCard.faqSection.label: FAQ Section
promptTemplateCard.headline.description: Discover a distinctive headline copy for your website, attentively crafted to engage your target market.
promptTemplateCard.headline.label: Headline
promptTemplateCard.heroBanner.descriptio: Design a compelling hero banner for your website, featuring a captivating title, body, and call-to-action button.
promptTemplateCard.heroBanner.label: Hero Banner
promptTemplateCard.newPrompt.description: To start a new prompt use this and then add it to your prompt templates for future use.
promptTemplateCard.newPrompt.label: New prompt
promptTemplateCard.rewrite.label: Rewrite
promptTemplateCard.tile.description: Craft engaging website Tile content, tailored to your target audience, with a succinct title and body.
promptTemplateCard.tile.label: Tile
